channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
item.description: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-astral

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
item.description: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4-mini-and-nano

item.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
item.description: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/equipping-workers-with-insights-about-compensation

item.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
item.description: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/why-codex-security-doesnt-include-sast
